Payment Methods

Not sure what PayPal payment method to use? Click here to learn more.
Merchant Location
Merchant Location

If not specified, Default Country from General Config will be used

[WEBSITE]
PayPal All-in-One Payment Solutions
PayPal All-in-One Payment Solutions
Choose a secure bundled payment solution for your business. Help
Payments Advanced (Includes Express Checkout)Learn MoreAccept payments with a PCI-compliant checkout that keeps customers on your site.
Payments Advanced (Includes Express Checkout)
Required PayPal Settings
Required PayPal Settings
Payments Advanced
Payments Advanced
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
PayPal recommends you set up an additional User on your account at manager.paypal.com, instead of entering your admin username and password here. This will enhance your security and prevent service interruptions if you later change your password. If you do not want to set up an additional User, you can re-enter your Merchant Login here.

PayPal recommends that you set up an additional User on your account at manager.paypal.com

[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
Important: To use PayPal Payments Advanced, you must configure your PayPal Payments Advanced account on the PayPal website. Once you log into your PayPal Advanced account, navigate to the Service Settings - Hosted Checkout Pages - Set Up menu and set the options described below
  • AVS: No
  • CSC: No
  • Enable Secure Token: Yes
Express Checkout
Express Checkout
Don't have a PayPal account? Simply enter your email address.
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]

Both section above must be complete.

[WEBSITE]

PayPal Payments Advanced lets you give customers access to financing through Paypal Credit® - at no additional cost to you. You get paid up front, even though customers have more time to pay. A pre-integrated payment button lets customers pay quickly with Paypal Credit®. Learn More

[WEBSITE]
Advertise Paypal Credit
Advertise Paypal Credit
Why Advertise Financing?
Give your sales a boost when you advertise financing.
PayPal helps turn browsers into buyers with financing from Paypal Credit®. Your customers have more time to pay, while you get paid up front – at no additional cost to you. Use PayPal’s free banner ads that let you advertise Paypal Credit® financing as a payment option when your customers check out with PayPal. The PayPal Advertising Program has been shown to generate additional purchases as well as increase consumer's average purchase sizes by 15% or more. See Details.

Required to display a banner

Settlement Report Settings
Settlement Report Settings

SFTP Credentials
⚠️ Install phpseclib/phpseclib

[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
Use colon to specify port. For example: "test.example.com:5224".

By default it is "reports.paypal.com".

[WEBSITE]

By default it is "/ppreports/outgoing".

[WEBSITE]

Scheduled Fetching

[WEBSITE]

PayPal retains reports for 45 days.

[GLOBAL]
 :   :  [GLOBAL]
Frontend Experience Settings
Frontend Experience Settings

Displays on catalog pages and homepage.

[STORE VIEW]

PayPal Merchant Pages Style

Allowable values: "paypal", "primary" (default), your_custom_value (a custom payment page style from your merchant account profile).
[STORE VIEW]
The image at the top left of the checkout page. Max size is 750x90-pixel. https is highly encouraged.
[STORE VIEW]
The background color for the header of the checkout page. Case-insensitive six-character HTML hexadecimal color code in ASCII.
[STORE VIEW]
2-pixel perimeter around the header space.
[STORE VIEW]
The background color for the checkout page around the header and payment form.
[STORE VIEW]
Basic Settings - PayPal Express Checkout
Basic Settings - PayPal Express Checkout

It is recommended to set this value to "PayPal" per store views.

[STORE VIEW]
[STORE VIEW]
[WEBSITE]
[STORE VIEW]

Specifies what the Authorization Honor Period is on the merchant’s PayPal account. It must mirror the setting in PayPal.

[WEBSITE]

Specifies what the Order Valid Period is on the merchant’s PayPal account. It must mirror the setting in PayPal.

[WEBSITE]

The default number of child authorizations in your PayPal account is 1. To do multiple authorizations please contact PayPal to request an increase.

[WEBSITE]
Advanced Settings
Advanced Settings

Also affects mini-shopping cart.

[STORE VIEW]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
If this option is enabled, customer can change shipping address and shipping method on PayPal website. In live mode works via HTTPS protocol only.

Notice that PayPal can handle up to 10 shipping options. That is why Maho will transfer only first 10 cheapest shipping options if there are more than 10 available.

[WEBSITE]
[STORE VIEW]

Ability for buyer to purchase without PayPal account.

[WEBSITE]

This feature needs be enabled first for the merchant account through PayPal technical support.

[WEBSITE]
Merchants need to apply to PayPal for enabling billing agreements feature. Do not enable this option until PayPal confirms that billing agreements are enabled for your merchant account.

Whether to create a billing agreement, if there are no active billing agreements available.

[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]

  • CSC: No
  • Enable Secure Token: Yes

Frontend Experience Settings
Frontend Experience Settings

Displays on catalog pages and homepage.

[STORE VIEW]

PayPal Merchant Pages Style

Allowable values: "paypal", "primary" (default), your_custom_value (a custom payment page style from your merchant account profile).
[STORE VIEW]
The image at the top left of the checkout page. Max size is 750x90-pixel. https is highly encouraged.
[STORE VIEW]
The background color for the header of the checkout page. Case-insensitive six-character HTML hexadecimal color code in ASCII.
[STORE VIEW]
2-pixel perimeter around the header space.
[STORE VIEW]
The background color for the checkout page around the header and payment form.
[STORE VIEW]
Basic Settings - PayPal Express Checkout
Basic Settings - PayPal Express Checkout

It is recommended to set this value to "PayPal" per store views.

[STORE VIEW]
[STORE VIEW]
[WEBSITE]
[STORE VIEW]

Specifies what the Authorization Honor Period is on the merchant’s PayPal account. It must mirror the setting in PayPal.

[WEBSITE]

Specifies what the Order Valid Period is on the merchant’s PayPal account. It must mirror the setting in PayPal.

[WEBSITE]

The default number of child authorizations in your PayPal account is 1. To do multiple authorizations please contact PayPal to request an increase.

[WEBSITE]
Advanced Settings
Advanced Settings

Also affects mini-shopping cart.

[STORE VIEW]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
If this option is enabled, customer can change shipping address and shipping method on PayPal website. In live mode works via HTTPS protocol only.

Notice that PayPal can handle up to 10 shipping options. That is why Maho will transfer only first 10 cheapest shipping options if there are more than 10 available.

[WEBSITE]
[STORE VIEW]

Ability for buyer to purchase without PayPal account.

[WEBSITE]

This feature needs be enabled first for the merchant account through PayPal technical support.

[WEBSITE]
Merchants need to apply to PayPal for enabling billing agreements feature. Do not enable this option until PayPal confirms that billing agreements are enabled for your merchant account.

Whether to create a billing agreement, if there are no active billing agreements available.

[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]

PayPal Billing Agreement Settings

Will appear as a payment option only for customers who have at least one active billing agreement.

PayPal Express Checkout
PayPal Express Checkout
Add another payment method to your existing solution or as a stand-alone option. Help
Express CheckoutLearn MoreAdd PayPal as an additional payment method to your checkout page.
Express Checkout
Required PayPal Settings
Required PayPal Settings
Express Checkout
Express Checkout
Don't have a PayPal account? Simply enter your email address.
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]

PayPal Express Checkout lets you give customers access to financing through Paypal Credit® - at no additional cost to you. You get paid up front, even though customers have more time to pay. A pre-integrated payment button lets customers pay quickly with Paypal Credit®. Learn More

[WEBSITE]
Advertise Paypal Credit
Advertise Paypal Credit
Why Advertise Financing?
Give your sales a boost when you advertise financing.
PayPal helps turn browsers into buyers with financing from Paypal Credit®. Your customers have more time to pay, while you get paid up front – at no additional cost to you. Use PayPal’s free banner ads that let you advertise Paypal Credit® financing as a payment option when your customers check out with PayPal. The PayPal Advertising Program has been shown to generate additional purchases as well as increase consumer's average purchase sizes by 15% or more. See Details.

Required to display a banner

Braintree Payments - Configuration
Braintree Payments - Configuration
To use this module you will need an existing production or sandbox Braintree account. You can apply at braintreepayments.com.

Braintree Account Details

Warning: Do not use 'Sandbox' on a production environment.
Your API details above will need to reflect your Sandbox or your Production account.

[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]

If you're accepting different currencies across multiple store views/websites you'll need to adjust your merchant account ID in the correct scope, if you're using the Magento currency switcher you'll need to enable the section below.
Find out more about merchant accounts.

[STORE VIEW]

If you're accepting different currencies across multiple store views/websites you'll need to adjust your merchant account ID in the correct scope, if you're using the Magento currency switcher you'll need to enable the section below.
Find out more about merchant accounts.

[STORE VIEW]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]
Valid Credentials
You're ready to accept payments via Braintree

Currency Switcher

If you're using the Magento built in currency switcher you'll need to activate this section to ensure the customers payment goes into your correct merchant account. If you use store views for separate countries you do not need this feature enabled.
Note: The invoices will still show up as your base currency, but the customer will be charged in their selected currency for the correct amount.

[STORE VIEW]
Currency Code Merchant Account ID
USD

You need to supply each merchant account ID for each enabled currency.

[STORE VIEW]

Testing Settings

Debugging will cause a log to be written to the var/log/gene_braintree.log file. As no credit card data ever hits the server this file will never contain any crucial customer information.

[STORE VIEW]
Braintree Payments - PayPal
Braintree Payments - PayPal

You must first configure the Braintree Payments - Configuration section with your Braintree account details.
[WEBSITE]
[STORE VIEW]

PayPal Express

PayPal Express functionality allows customers to checkout directly with PayPal instead of using the default checkout.

[STORE VIEW]

Allow customers to complete their order via PayPal express, this will complete the entire quote.

[STORE VIEW]

Allow customers to checkout directly from the product page using PayPal express. This will allow them to only checkout with the currently viewed item.

[STORE VIEW]

If an existing customer makes an express order using their customer account email should we link the guest order to their customer account?

[STORE VIEW]

Capture

Authorize - Will only auth the payment and store a token, the transaction will not be settled.
Authorize & Capture - We will instantly settle the transaction within the checkout.

[WEBSITE]

If you're just authorizing transactions you can define at what point they should be submitted for settlement.

[WEBSITE]
[STORE VIEW]

Features

PayPal will automatically display each enabled funding option to eligible buyers. For example, PayPal Credit is only shown to buyers in countries where PayPal Credit is offered and the currency offered by the merchant is USD.

[STORE VIEW]

Checkout - Will only require the customer to sign in, we will only be able to take a single payment.
Vault - Allows us to save the customers PayPal account for later purchases and use with the Vault.
View more information

[STORE VIEW]

Storing the customers PayPal in the vault will allow them to instantly purchase any product without having to login to PayPal again.

[STORE VIEW]

Use the checkout flow for all transactions that the customer has not opted into having their PayPal account saved. This can improve conversion rates as the Vault flow requests the customer setup a billing agreement.

[STORE VIEW]

The locale for the PayPal popup window

[STORE VIEW]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]

[STORE VIEW]

Display - PayPal Express Button - Primary Button on the Cart Page

The Primary button is located at the bottom of the page near the "Grand Total" amount.

[STORE VIEW]
[STORE VIEW]
[STORE VIEW]
[STORE VIEW]
[STORE VIEW]

The Secondary button is located at the top of the Cart page.

[STORE VIEW]

[STORE VIEW]
[STORE VIEW]
[STORE VIEW]

Braintree Payments - Credit Card
Braintree Payments - Credit Card


You must first configure the Braintree Payments - Configuration section with your Braintree account details.
[WEBSITE]
[STORE VIEW]

Capture

Authorize - Will only auth the payment and store a token, the transaction will not be settled.
Authorize & Capture - We will instantly settle the transaction within the checkout.

[WEBSITE]

If you're just authorizing transactions you can define at what point they should be submitted for settlement.

[WEBSITE]
[STORE VIEW]

Display a message above the card details section on the checkout.

[STORE VIEW]

Features

The vault allows you to securely store the customers credit card on Braintree's servers. We're provided with a token which allows the customer to make future payments without having to enter any details again.

[STORE VIEW]

Should we verify the CVV against the card?

[STORE VIEW]
[WEBSITE]

Display the accepted card types on the checkout.

[STORE VIEW]
[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]

3D Secure

The 3D Secure feature enables the shopper to enter a password to confirm their identity with the card issuer. If accepted they then complete their order, and when received by you, you have much more confidence that is genuine and real.
Notice: To use 3D secure in production your checkout must run over HTTPs. If you accept AMEX Cards, they do not support 3DSecure and will bypass all 3D Secure checks.

[STORE VIEW]

Action to complete if the liability shift fails after the 3D secure. If the liability cannot be shifted the merchant is liable for charge backs.
Request Alternative Payment Method - Block the payment and inform the customer to choose a different payment method. This will also block any cards that do not support 3DSecure.
Accept & Mark as Fraud - Will accept the payment but mark as fraudulent within Magento for manual inspection.
Accept - Will accept the payment and be processed as a normal order (this setting is not recommended).

[STORE VIEW]

The threshold which requires a transaction to be passed through 3D secure. Set this to 0 to pass all transactions through 3D secure.

[STORE VIEW]

Determine when 3D secure should display based on the customers billing country. Cards vaulted using 3D secure will ignore this option.

[WEBSITE]
[WEBSITE]

Kount

Braintree offers a direct integration with Kount, our partner for providing advanced fraud detection technology. To use this feature, you must be processing at least 2500 transactions per month, and you’ll be subject to additional fees from Kount for their services. To get started, contact accounts@braintreepayments.com. You can view more information here.

[STORE VIEW]

Please specify which Kount environment you're using.

[STORE VIEW]

Your Kount API authentication token. This can be located through the Kount AWC panel, via Admin > API Keys. Please ensure it has all permissions.

[STORE VIEW]

Prevents the transaction from being sent to Kount for evaluation as part of Advanced Fraud Tools checks, on orders placed through the admin only.

[STORE VIEW]
https://maho.tenniswarehouse.com.au/index.php/braintree/kount_ens/

This is the ENS URL you will need to add into your website in the Kount AWC control panel. This URL must be publicly accessible for the ENS to function correctly. You'll need to add this ENS URL to the 'OPT-IN' website.

[STORE VIEW]

The IPs that have access to the ENS endpoint above. These can be individual IP's or ranges separated with commas. To allow from all IPs leave this field empty (not recommended).

[STORE VIEW]

Display

[STORE VIEW]
Braintree Payments - Apple Pay
Braintree Payments - Apple Pay

You must first configure the Braintree Payments - Configuration section with your Braintree account details.

Apple Pay will only be displayed as a payment option on supported devices regardless of it being enabled. Find out more here.

[WEBSITE]
[STORE VIEW]

Apple Pay Express

Apple Pay Express functionality allows customers to checkout directly with Apple Pay instead of using the default checkout.

[STORE VIEW]

Should we hide the payment method from the standard checkout process? This means Apple Pay will only be available as an express option.

Allow customers to complete their order via Apple Pay express, this will complete the entire quote.

[STORE VIEW]

Allow customers to checkout directly from the product page using Apple Pay express. This will allow them to only checkout with the currently viewed item.

[STORE VIEW]

Authorize - Will only auth the payment and store a token, the transaction will not be settled.
Authorize & Capture - We will instantly settle the transaction within the checkout.
